task.title: Move footer GitHub and Twitter links under Company

events.content: Moved footer GitHub and Twitter links from Community to Company: Moved footer GitHub and Twitter links from Community to Company

raw.question: Moved footer GitHub and Twitter links from Community to Company
raw.chosen: Moved footer GitHub and Twitter links from Community to Company
raw.reasoning: Those links represent the organization rather than the user community, so they fit better under Company.

retrospective.summary: Moved the footer GitHub and Twitter links into the Company column and left Community with Blog only.
